description:
Deep antagonistic quality review of `hx-form` (T2-35). 3/6 libraries — validation orchestration wrapper.

Review `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-form/`.

**Audit areas:**
1. TypeScript — strict, form submit event typing with FormData, validation result typing, reset behavior
2. Accessibility — wraps native `<form>`, error summary announced on submit failure (`role="alert"`), individual field errors associated to fields via `aria-describedby`, required fields indicated, axe-core pass
3. Tests — submit fires hx-submit with FormData, invalid fields prevent submit, error summary shown, reset clears fields, nested hx-* components participate in validation
4. Storybook — full form example, validation demo, error summary, reset
5. CSS — error summary styling, `--hx-*` tokens, CSS parts
6. Performance — bundle < 5KB
7. Drupal — works with Twig form templates, server-side validation compatible

**Output:** Write findings to `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-form/AUDIT.md` with severity (P0/P1/P2). DO NOT fix — document only. Commit AUDIT.md as your PR.
title: AUDIT: hx-form — T2-35 antagonistic quality review
